nadir.desc: The nadir view shows a developed property containing a single primary structure positioned near the eastern property boundary|Four large containers are aligned along the western side of the building|An unpaved circulation route extends around the structure and connects the various portions of the site|No clearly identifiable property entrance is visible from this perspective|A large parking area is located south of the building and contains approximately twenty parked vehicles arranged in two rows with a wide open area between them|In the northwestern portion of the property, several stacks of materials and multiple vehicles are visible|A small structure is located in the southwestern portion of the site adjacent to additional stored materials|A U-shaped structure is visible west of this area|The majority of the property consists of unpaved surfaces, with limited landscaped areas located near the southwestern portion of the building.

alpha.desc: The alpha view highlights the primary structure on the property|The southern facade contains three large bay openings near the center of the building|A small door and window are visible toward the western end of the structure, while an additional door and covered area are located toward the eastern end|A utility pole is visible near the southeastern portion of the property.

bravo.desc: The bravo view shows the property from the west|Four large containers are positioned along the western side of the building in front of three large bay openings|A smaller door is visible toward the southern end of the western façade|In the northwestern portion of the property, several stacks of materials are visible|A U-shaped concrete structure is located in the southwestern area of the site and appears to consist of partial walls without a covering.

charlie.desc: The charlie view shows the property from the north|Concrete walls are visible along portions of the southern and eastern property boundaries|The northern façade of the building contains three large bay openings near the center, with a door and multiple windows located on both sides|Several windows are visible on the eastern side of the structure, while additional windows are present on the western side|Two large waste containers are located near the northwestern corner of the building.

delta.desc: The delta view shows the eastern side of the property|Two ground-level doors are visible near the center of the building, including a single door and a wider double-door opening|Multiple windows are present on both levels of the structure|Near the northern end of the building, an elevated opening is connected to the ground by an inclined structure|From this perspective, the previously identified U-shaped concrete structure appears to contain earthen material.
